title: metastelma mexicanum
intro: Metastelma mexicanum, also known as Mexican climbing milkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant has been found to have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Metastelma mexicanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and in some regions, it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application.
